title: stachys flexuosa
intro: Stachys flexuosa, also known as flexible hedge nettle or woundwort, is a perennial herb in the mint family that is native to Europe and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Stachys flexuosa include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Stachys flexuosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to soothe and calm irritated skin, as well as internally to support digestive health.
